series_metadata.series_description: OIU Agents’ application materials for covert IDs and all other covert identification materials. During employment and upon separation, the materials should be kept separate from an Agent’s personnel file to maintain confidentiality.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for the length of employment plus one year after separation. ; Electronic: Retain for the length of employment plus one year after separation., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
